commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 23:6 And David divided them into divisions among the sons of Levi, namely, Gershon, Kohath, and Merari. Into 24 courses, like the priests, that each class might serve twice a year for a whole week, chap. (Tirinus) God had already made choice of the posterity of Levi; and David, with the princes, Sadoc, disposed of them by lots, (chap. ) to serve in the tabernacle, and in the future temple. (Worthington).
